title: Labor Termination Calculator
meta_title: Labor Termination Calculator 2025 | Vacation, 13th, FGTS - CalcForgeTools
meta_description: Calculate your full Brazilian labor termination package: proportional vacation, 13th salary, FGTS balance, 40% penalty, and notice period. Free instant simulation.

hero.title: Labor Termination Calculator
hero.subtitle: Know exactly how much you are entitled to receive upon termination. Enter your salary and dates to see every component broken down: vacation, 13th salary, FGTS, and penalty.

formula: Termination = Prop. Vacation + 1/3 Bonus + Prop. 13th + FGTS + 40% Penalty + Notice
formula_explanation: Termination is calculated by adding: proportional vacation (months worked in the accrual period ÷ 12 × salary), the constitutional 1/3 vacation bonus, proportional 13th salary (months in the year ÷ 12 × salary), FGTS balance (8% × salary × total months), 40% FGTS penalty (only for termination without cause), and proportional notice period.
example: An employee with a R$ 3,500 salary fired without cause after 3 years would receive approximately: proportional vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th, accumulated FGTS with 40% penalty, and a 39-day notice period.

faq.question: What is the 40% FGTS penalty?
faq.answer: It is a penalty the employer pays when firing without cause. It equals 40% of the total FGTS balance accumulated during the employment contract.

faq.question: Do I receive anything if fired for cause?
faq.answer: Only the salary balance for days worked and any overdue vacation. There is no right to notice period, FGTS penalty, proportional vacation, or proportional 13th salary.

faq.question: Is the notice period always 30 days?
faq.answer: No. The notice period starts at 30 days and gains 3 additional days per year worked at the company, up to a maximum of 120 days (30 + 90 extra days for 30 years of service).
